itinerary.title: Delhi to Kathmandu Travel
itinerary.description: Take a flight from Delhi to Kathmandu. Meet our guide and transfer to your hotel. In the evening, enjoy free time walking around the lively Thamel Market. Spend the night in Kathmandu.

itinerary.title: Pashupatinath Temple Visit
itinerary.description: Visit the holy Pashupatinath Temple in the early morning for prayers. Visit the large Boudhanath Stupa and the ancient Guhyeshwari Temple. In the evening, watch the beautiful Aarti prayer ceremony by the Bagmati River. Spend the night in Kathmandu.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Heritage Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Visit Swayambhunath temple, which is also called the Monkey Temple. Explore the ancient wood and stone carvings at Patan Durbar Square and Hanuman Dhoka Durbar Square. Enjoy some shopping in the evening. Spend the night in Kathmandu.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Pokhara Travel
itinerary.description: Enjoy a scenic drive or take a short flight to Pokhara. In the evening, enjoy a peaceful boat ride on Phewa Lake. Spend the night in Pokhara.

itinerary.title: Pokhara Sightseeing Tour
itinerary.description: Watch a beautiful sunrise over the snowy Himalayas from Sarangkot. Visit the holy Bindhyabasini Temple, the Devi's Fall waterfall, and the deep Gupteshwar Mahadev Cave. Spend the night in Pokhara.

itinerary.title: Begnas Lake and Peace Pagoda Visit
itinerary.description: Take a day trip to the calm Begnas Lake and visit the World Peace Pagoda on the hill. Enjoy a free evening for shopping or resting. Spend the night in Pokhara.

itinerary.title: Pokhara to Chitwan Travel
itinerary.description: Drive to Chitwan National Park. In the evening, watch a traditional Tharu cultural dance show performed by local villagers. Spend the night in Chitwan.

itinerary.title: Chitwan National Park Safari
itinerary.description: Go on a thrilling morning jeep safari inside Chitwan National Park to see rhinos, deer, and birds. Enjoy a peaceful canoe ride down the river. Spend the night in Chitwan.

itinerary.title: Chitwan to Lumbini Travel
itinerary.description: Drive to Lumbini, the birthplace of Lord Buddha. Visit the sacred Maya Devi Temple and walk around the beautiful international monasteries. Spend the night in Lumbini.

itinerary.title: Lumbini to Janakpur Travel
itinerary.description: Drive to Janakpur, a city rich in history. Visit the beautiful Janaki Temple and the Ram Sita Marriage Temple. Spend the night in Janakpur.

itinerary.title: Janakpur to Bandipur Travel
itinerary.description: Drive to the charming hill town of Bandipur. Walk through its old streets with traditional houses and enjoy views of the Himalayas. Spend the night in Bandipur.

itinerary.title: Return to Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Drive back to Kathmandu. Spend the evening resting or buying souvenirs. Spend the night in Kathmandu.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Nagarkot Travel
itinerary.description: Drive up to the mountain village of Nagarkot. Enjoy a spectacular sunset view over the high Himalayan peaks. Spend the night in Nagarkot.

itinerary.title: Nagarkot to Dhulikhel Travel
itinerary.description: Wake up early for a beautiful sunrise over the Himalayas. Drive to the old town of Dhulikhel and enjoy peaceful walks through local villages. Spend the night in Dhulikhel.

itinerary.title: Departure from Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Drive back to Kathmandu airport for your flight back home. Your complete tour of Nepal ends with wonderful memories.

title: Complete Nepal Exploration
description: Explore the very best of Nepal on this 15-day tour. Visit holy temples in Kathmandu and Janakpur, see the birthplace of Buddha in Lumbini, go on a jungle safari in Chitwan, and enjoy stunning Himalayan views from Pokhara, Nagarkot, and Dhulikhel.
highlights: Pashupatinath Temple visit and evening Aarti prayer ceremony
Scenic boat rides on Phewa Lake and views from Sarangkot
Exciting wildlife jeep safari in Chitwan National Park
Beautiful sunrise and sunset views over the Himalayas from Nagarkot
